items.title: Kimi K3 brings frontier performance to open models
items.oneliner: Moonshot's 2.8T Kimi K3 ships with 1M context, narrowing the closed-model gap and raising pressure on pricing.

items.title: Google delayed Gemini 3.5 Pro
items.oneliner: Bloomberg says Gemini 3.5 Pro slipped after weak coding results, a reminder that frontier launches still fail eval gates.

items.title: Apple is locking down AI talent
items.oneliner: Apple reportedly sent legal letters targeting OpenAI hires, showing the AI talent war is now a legal battlefield.

items.title: DeepMind's Kaggle benchmark backfired
items.oneliner: A 25,000 dollar DeepMind Kaggle prize went to what critics called AI slop, exposing how broken evaluation incentives remain.

items.title: Decoy Font hides text from AI
items.oneliner: Decoy Font uses hybrid imagery to stay readable to humans while confusing OCR, a clever new anti-scraping defense.

items.title: Classical ML still catches AI text
items.oneliner: A lightweight classifier beat perplexity tricks on web fiction, suggesting old-school detection still has practical signal.

items.title: LM Studio shipped an open-model agent
items.oneliner: LM Studio Bionic adds local and cloud agent workflows with zero-retention claims, pushing private AI toward real daily use.

items.title: NotebookLM became Gemini Notebook
items.oneliner: Google folded NotebookLM into Gemini with 30 million users and code execution, turning a niche research app into platform surface.

items.title: Solod compiles Go into C
items.oneliner: Solod turns a strict subset of Go into C11, offering systems programmers Go ergonomics without a runtime.

items.title: A 6GB desktop trained audio diffusion
items.oneliner: A seven-year-old Linux box with 6GB VRAM trained a kick-drum diffusion model, lowering the floor for hobbyist audio ML.
